subject: [DOC] Update release version for RTDs in London
commit_message:
[DOC] Update release version for RTDs in London

Modify the versions in conf.py to create London RTDs

Issue-ID: OOM-3174

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I57f9332df2702cb0e1fbf4ba0566600f2fb3c87f
